creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On Sat, 2013-05-25 at 19:22 +0200, Niclas Zeising wrote:
> I need to learn to read the PR more properly...  The clang version was
> in there.  However, can you try compiling without any special CFLAGS, I
> believe you've manually put -O3 in there?  Just to get more data points.
>  Also, attached the mentioned files (in the transcript) to the PR, if at
> all possible.
> Regards!

Hello Niclas,
sorry, my fault. I compile with -O3 and as Dimitry already stated, it is
indeed the fault of this -O3 option.

I should read the error message more carefully, since there was already
a hint that it could be the -O3 optimization :-(

Oliver
